task_completion.description: Agent accesses and filters the correct 'w1' TIF images from the input directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output, script content, or file explorer showing access to '~/Fiji_Data/raw/BBBC005/' and filtering specifically for files containing 'w1' and '.TIF' or '.tif'.

task_completion.description: Agent calculates the four required focus metrics: Variance of Laplacian, Normalized Variance, Tenengrad, and StdDev.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Script content (Python, Fiji macro, etc.) showing mathematical operations for the metrics (e.g., Laplacian variance, Sobel gradients for Tenengrad, standard deviation of intensities).

task_completion.description: Agent ranks images by VoL and classifies them as PASS or FAIL based on the batch median.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code logic showing median calculation, sorting/ranking by VoL, and conditional assignment of 'PASS'/'FAIL', or the resulting CSV data displaying these calculated ranks and statuses.

task_completion.description: Agent generates the focus_metrics.csv file with all required columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer showing 'focus_metrics.csv' in '~/Fiji_Data/results/focus_qc/', or a terminal/editor displaying its contents with columns: filename, laplacian_var, normalized_var, tenengrad, stddev, rank, qc_status.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the qc_summary.txt file with the required statistics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'qc_summary.txt', which must include the total number of images, PASS/FAIL counts, the filenames of the best and worst focused images, and the median threshold used.

task_completion.description: Agent saves a visual comparison montage of the best and worst focused images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer, file explorer thumbnail, or script execution showing 'focus_comparison.png' in the results folder, containing a side-by-side or top-bottom montage of two microscopy images (one sharp, one blurry).

integrity.description: The agent actually computed the metrics across the dataset rather than hardcoding fake values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a script (e.g., Python or ImageJ macro) being executed that iterates over the files and performs image processing operations, rather than just echoing a pre-written string.

integrity.description: The agent used the exact requested input and output paths.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands, script variables, or file explorer windows explicitly showing the paths '~/Fiji_Data/raw/BBBC005/' and '~/Fiji_Data/results/focus_qc/'.

integrity.description: The comparison image contains actual microscopy images from the dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'focus_comparison.png' file shows actual synthetic cell images (fluorescent blobs/cells), not placeholder images, blank squares, or text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The BBBC005 dataset contains 9,600 synthetic images with focus blur levels ranging from F1 (sharp) to F48 (blurry). The images are 696x520 pixels in 8-bit TIF format. The task requires processing 'w1' images. Verify that the agent handles files with 'w1' in the name. The comparison image ('focus_comparison.png') should show actual microscopy cells, with one being noticeably sharper (best focus, closer to F1) and the other blurrier (worst focus, closer to F48).
